name: Gratin of Potatoes with Anchovies
recipeInstructions:
1. The anchovies can be omitted if desired.
2. Select a baking dish that can transition from oven to table.
3. To reduce saltiness, soak the anchovies in milk for 20 minutes. Drain and discard the milk.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F.
5. Rub the base and sides of a 12-inch baking dish with garlic and brush thoroughly with rosemary oil.
6. Drain the potatoes and pat dry. Arrange layers of potatoes, anchovies, and basil in the dish until all are used. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour in chicken stock. Bake until potatoes are tender and liquid is absorbed, about 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
8. Top with grated Swiss cheese and bake an additional 10 minutes.
9. Allow to cool for several minutes before serving individual portions on plates.
